definition.en: Your point of power is in the present, as stated earlier (in the 657th session in Chapter Fifteen).
definition.zh: 你的力量之点就在当下，如先前（第十五章第六五七节）所述。

definition.en: Again, regardless of what you have been taught, the point of power is in the present; and again, your present beliefs will be used to structure your recollections.
definition.zh: 再说一遍，不论你被教导了什么，力量之点就在当下；而且，你当下的信念将被用来构建你的回忆。

definition.en: In each case, however, the point of power is the present, and from that moment you choose which you, and which world.
definition.zh: 然而，在每一种情况下，力量之点都是当下，而从那一刻起你选择哪一个自己，以及哪一个世界。

definition.en: Now: You must understand that your present is the point at which flesh and matter meet with the spirit. Therefore the present is your point of power in your current lifetime, as you think of it.
definition.zh: 现在：你必须明白，你的当下是血肉与物质遇见灵性的那一点。因此，当下就是你在当前生命中的力量之点，如你所想的那样。

definition.en: YOU FORM YOUR REALITY NOW, in capital letters, through the intersection of soul in flesh, and in your terms the present is your point of power.
definition.zh: 你现在就形成你的实相，大写字母，通过灵魂与肉体的交汇，而用你的话说，当下就是你的力量之点。

explanation: 力量之点在于当下，意味着你改变现实的唯一有效时刻就是现在。过去和未来都只是你当前信念的投射——你如何回忆过去、如何想象未来，完全由你此刻的信念决定。因此，试图通过挖掘过去的错误来解决问题是徒劳的，因为你的当下信念会重塑那些记忆。同样，单纯等待未来发生改变而不采取行动也是无效的。你必须在当下同时运用理性行动和直觉信念：比如在五分钟内完全专注于你想要的结果，用视觉化或言语肯定，同时不忽视现实中的合理步骤。你的身体、情感和精神能力都聚焦于此刻的肉体中，所以任何改变都只能从这一瞬间开始。即使你相信轮回，那些所谓的前世也与你同时存在，每个自我都在自己的当下拥有力量。
name_en: The point of power is in the present

quotes.text: In other words, the magical approach and the so-called rational one are to be combined in a certain fashion for best results. People sometimes write you, telling of their intent to make money -- or rather, to have it. They concentrate upon money, so they say, and wait for it in full faith that it will be attracted to them because of their belief and concentration. They might do the point of power exercise,2 for example. They may also, however, have quit their jobs, ignored impulses to find other work, or to take any rational approaches, and rely upon, say, the magical approach alone. This does not work either, of course.
quotes.translation: 换言之，魔法途径与所谓理性途径必须以特定方式结合才能获得最佳效果。人们有时会写信给你，诉说他们想要赚钱——更确切地说，是拥有金钱。他们声称自己专注于金钱，满怀信心地等待金钱被吸引而来，只因他们相信自己的信念与专注。例如，他们可能会进行"力量点在当下"的练习。然而，他们也可能辞去工作，忽视寻找其他工作的冲动，或拒绝采取任何理性途径，完全依赖魔法途径。这当然也行不通。
quotes.source_file: 10-09-10-09The Magical Approach_ Seth Spea - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: 1. From my dream notebook: (See my painting at end of Session 4.)

quotes.text: All of this can be avoided through the realization that your point of power is in the present, as stated earlier (in the 657th session in Chapter Fifteen). Not only do you operate within your own personal beliefs, of course, but within a mass system to which you subscribe to one degree or another. Within that organization medical insurance becomes a necessity for most of you, so I am not suggesting that you drop it. Nevertheless, let us look more closely at the situation.
quotes.translation: 这一切都可以通过领悟"你的力量点在当下"而避免，正如前文所述（第657节，第十五章）。当然，你不仅运作于个人信念体系之内，也运作于你不同程度认同的集体系统之中。在该组织架构下，医疗保险对你们大多数人而言成为必需品，所以我并非建议你放弃它。尽管如此，让我们更仔细地审视这个情况。
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: You do not understand the communications between your selves and pets, for example, where in their own way they interpret and react to your beliefs.* They mirror your ideas, then, and so become vulnerable as they would not be in their natural circumstances. In greater terms their relationship with you is natural, of course, but their innate realization that the creature's point of power is in the present is to some degree undermined by their own receptivity and translation of your beliefs. A young kitten is treated differently than an older one. The cat responds to such conditioning. In the same way your own conclusions about age become fact in your experience. In line with them, if you could convince yourself that you were ten years younger, or ten years older, then it would be faithfully reflected in your personal environment.
quotes.translation: 例如，你并不理解自己与宠物之间的沟通——它们以自身方式诠释并回应你的信念。它们因此映照出你的观念，从而变得脆弱，而这在自然环境中本不会发生。从更宏观的角度看，它们与你的关系自然是合理的，但宠物天生领悟"生物的力量点在当下"这一事实，却因它们接收并转译你的信念而受到某种程度的削弱。幼猫与老猫受到的对待不同，猫会对此作出反应。同样，你关于年龄的结论会成为你经验中的事实。若你能说服自己年轻十岁或年长十岁，这也会忠实地反映在你的个人环境中。
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: You must look within yourself for evidences of what you want in terms of positive experience. Examine your past with that in mind. Imagine your future from the power point of the present. In such a way at least you are not using the past to reinforce your limitations, or projecting them into the future. It is only natural to contrast what you want with what you have, and it is very easy to become discouraged in so doing, but looking for errors in the past will not help you. A correctly utilized five-minute period of time can be of great benefit, however. In this period concentrate upon the fact that the point of power is now. Feel and dwell upon the certainty that your emotional, spiritual and psychic abilities are focused through the flesh, and for five minutes only direct all of your attention toward what you want. Use visualization or verbal thought -- whatever comes most naturally to you; but for that period do not concentrate upon any lacks, just upon your desire.
quotes.translation: 你必须在内在寻找积极经验的证据。带着这个意图检视你的过去。从当下的力量点想象你的未来。至少这样，你不会用过去强化自己的局限，或将它们投射到未来。将你想要的与已有的进行对比本是自然之事，但这样做时很容易气馁，然而在过往中寻找错误对你毫无助益。不过，正确运用五分钟的时间却能带来巨大益处。在这五分钟里，专注于"力量点在当下"这一事实。感受并沉浸于这样的确信：你的情感、灵性与心灵能力皆通过肉身聚焦。在这五分钟内，将所有注意力导向你所渴望的事物。运用观想或言语思维——选择你最自然的方式；但在这段时间里，不要关注任何匮乏，只专注于你的渴望。
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: You have been taught that you are at the mercy of previous events, so your idea of looking for the source of personal difficulty is to examine the past, but -- to find what you did wrong there, or what mistakes occurred there, or what inadequate interpretations were made there! Again, regardless of what you have been taught, the point of power is in the present; and again, your present beliefs will be used to structure your recollections.
quotes.translation: 你被教导自己受制于过往事件，因此你寻找个人困境根源的方式便是检视过去——但目的是找出自己当时做错了什么，或发生了什么错误，或做出了哪些不当诠释！再次强调，无论你被教导了什么，力量点在当下；同样，你当下的信念将用于构建你的记忆。
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: No one begins a race with a handicap, you may say, but that is obviously not the case. Individuals have often chosen such situations precisely as incentives, and many great men have done so. This does not mean that such disabilities are necessary. At any point that an individual realizes his point of power in the present, he will not need a barrier to test himself against, or to focus him in what he thinks of as the proper direction.
quotes.translation: 你可能会说，没有人带着障碍开始赛跑，但显然事实并非如此。个体常常特意选择这样的处境作为激励，许多伟人正是如此。这并不意味着此类障碍是必要的。当一个人在任何时刻领悟到自己的力量点在当下时，他便不再需要屏障来考验自己，或以此将自己导向自认为正确的方向。
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Those of you who believe in reincarnation in more or less conventional terms, can make the error of using or blaming "past" lives, organizing them through your current beliefs. It is bad enough to believe that you are at the mercy of one past, but to consider yourself helpless before innumerable previous errors from other lives puts you in an impossible situation; the conscious will is robbed of its power to act. Such lives exist simultaneously. They are other expressions of yourself, interacting, but with each conscious self possessing the point of power in its own present.
quotes.translation: 那些以或多或少传统方式相信转世的人，可能会犯下利用或责怪"前世"的错误，并通过你们当前的信念来组织它们。相信受制于一个过去已经够糟了，但若认为自己面对其他生命中无数先前的错误而无力改变，则会使你陷入不可能的境地；意识意志被剥夺了行动的力量。这样的生命同时存在。它们是你自己的其他表达，相互影响，但每个有意识的自我都在其自身的当下拥有力量之点。
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: In each case, however, the point of power is the present, and from that moment you choose which you, and which world. The experience of a country is the cumulative result of the choice of each individual in it, so as you choose your own circumstances you affect each other person within your country and your world.
quotes.translation: 然而，在每种情况下，力量之点都是当下，从那个时刻你选择哪个你，以及哪个世界。一个国家的经验是其每个个体选择的累积结果，因此当你选择自己的境遇时，你也会影响你国家和世界中的其他人。
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Now: You must understand that your present is the point at which flesh and matter meet with the spirit. Therefore the present is your point of power in your current lifetime, as you think of it. If you assign greater force to the past, then you will feel ineffective and deny yourself your own energy.
quotes.translation: 现在：你必须明白，你的当下是肉体与物质遇见灵性的点。因此，在你所认为的当前生命中，当下就是你的力量之点。如果你赋予过去更大的力量，那么你会感到无力，并否认自己的能量。
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Dineen, denied the support of the framework she had chosen, would have to face the questions that she had projected there. But all of the inner difficulties can be resolved by understanding that you form your own reality, and that your point of power is in the present (with emphasis).
quotes.translation: 迪宁，被剥夺了她所选择框架的支持，将不得不面对她投射到那里的问题。但所有内在的困难都可以通过理解你形成自己的实相，以及你的力量之点就在当下（强调）来解决。
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The point of power exercise is meant to familiarize you with your own energy and your ability to direct it. The natural hypnosis exercises (given in the last chapter) allows you greater effectiveness in directing and focusing that power.
quotes.translation: 力量之点练习旨在让你熟悉自己的能量以及引导它的能力。自然催眠练习（在上一章中给出）让你在引导和集中那力量时获得更大的效果。
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Let us first of all discuss the nature of hypnosis, quite natural hypnosis, and the ways in which you use it now. Then you will see how you can utilize it quite easily and deliberately in your present point of power.
quotes.translation: 让我们首先讨论催眠的本质，非常自然的催眠，以及你现在使用它的方式。然后你会看到如何在你当前的力量之点中轻松而有意识地利用它。
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The truth as far as it can be stated is this: YOU FORM YOUR REALITY NOW, in capital letters, through the intersection of soul in flesh, and in your terms the present is your point of power.
quotes.translation: 就所能陈述的真相而言：你当下形成你的实相，以大写字母强调，通过灵魂与肉身的交汇，而在你们的说法中，当下就是你的力量焦点。
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: In The Nature of Personal Reality, Seth deals extensively with the point of power, its exercises and meanings and benefits. See especially sessions 656-57 in Chapter 15.
quotes.translation: 在《个人实相的本质》中，赛斯广泛探讨了力量焦点及其练习、意义与益处。特别参见第15章第656-57节。
quotes.source_file: 10-09-10-09The Magical Approach_ Seth Spea - Jane Roberts.json
